title: store: tunnel_config table + encrypted config
verification: go test ./internal/store/... -count=1; config round-trips encrypted; API-shape responses never expose tokens

title: internal/tunnel: checksum-verified download + process supervisor
verification: go test ./internal/tunnel/... -count=1; checksum mismatch rejects download (nothing executed); name validation rejects shell metacharacters; supervisor starts, captures URL from fake script, stops on context cancel

title: handlers: tunnel CRUD/health + proxy-test
verification: go test ./api/... -count=1; envelope+snake_case+validation+audit on mutations; tailscale absent→409 with instructions; proxy-test returns {ok,latency_ms,error}, never 500 on bad proxy

title: background health loops (tunnel 60s + proxy pool 5min)
verification: go test ./internal/tunnel/... -count=1; health loop flips status on unreachable URL; loops start from startup (no init()) and stop cleanly on context cancel

title: per-phase gate + mandatory security pass
verification: go test ./... -count=1; go vet ./...; go test -race ./...; go build ./cmd/g0router; coverage ≥95.0%; security checklist (§7) recorded in ## Outcome
